return S(n)end,{},function(T,G)local S=L(G)local y=function()return i(T,{},G,S)end return y end,function(T,G)local S=L(G)local y=function(y)return i(T,{y},G,S)end return y end,function(T)m[T]=m[T]-(822809-822808)if-861972-(-861972)==m[T]then m[T],q[T]=nil,nil end end,function(T,G)local S=L(G)local y=function(y,P,E)return i(T,{y,P;E},G,S)end return y end,{},function()C=C+(-494244-(-494245))m[C]=-788560+788561 return C end return(Q(-490428+2516696,{}))(S(n))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[G(373861-398870)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
